item.description:
What's new in Sonault 1.2.0

  • Select every sound at once with ⌘A, and work on many at a time: a new action bar appears whenever more than one sound is selected, with Duplicate and Delete for the whole selection.
  • Copy and paste sounds with ⌘C and ⌘V — paste them back into Sonault to duplicate, or drop copied files in from Finder to import.
  • The ⌘K search now has Sounds and Labels tabs. Press ⇥ to switch, and pick a label to filter your library to it, just like clicking it in the sidebar.
